name: data-set-search-frontend
description: Product discovery for a home goods catalog: ranked full-text search plus reliable filters, backed by SQLite FTS5.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace backend && npm run typecheck --workspace frontend
